summary: Normalize the final event profile for PolinRider Expands Across npm, Packagist, Go Modules, and Chrome Extensions.

normalized_event_profile.event_name: PolinRider Expands Across npm, Packagist, Go Modules, and Chrome Extensions
normalized_event_profile.title: PolinRider Expands Across npm, Packagist, Go Modules, and Chrome Extensions
normalized_event_profile.confidence_reason: Direct supplied research source(s); unknowns preserved.

credentials_at_risk: developer, repository, registry, CI, and cloud credentials accessible during execution

artifact_analysis.execution_trigger: obfuscated JavaScript loaders hidden in repositories or fake font files execute through developer tooling such as VS Code tasks
payload_behavior: blockchain/public RPC retrieval and XOR decryption

open_questions: Exact affected versions and organization-specific execution remain to be established from local evidence.

defender_takeaways.detection: Scan dependency, repository, endpoint, and network exports for incident selectors.
defender_takeaways.hunting: Correlate selector matches with execution and identity telemetry.
defender_takeaways.remediation: Rebuild executed hosts and rotate exposed secrets from a clean system.
defender_takeaways.prevention: Pin reviewed dependencies and protect maintainer/registry identities.

containment_complete: Installation stopped and executed hosts isolated
recovery_complete: Known-good rebuild and negative post-recovery hunt
closure_required: UTC timeline, evidence custody, downstream identity audit, and credential rotation decision recorded
